src/main/java/com/example/service/OSSService.java * Provides a simplified interface for uploading files to Alibaba Cloud OSS. * This class is designed to be instantiated via the default no-argument constructor * and relies on environment variables for configuration to ensure security. *

*/ public class OSSService { // --- Configuration Constants --- // Ideally, these should be injected via a configuration framework (e.g., Spring @Value) // For this standalone utility implementation, we read from System Environment Variables. private static final String ENDPOINT = System.getenv("OSS_ENDPOINT"); private static final String ACCESS_KEY_ID = System.getenv("OSS_ACCESS_KEY_ID"); private static final String ACCESS_KEY_SECRET = System.getenv("OSS_ACCESS_KEY_SECRET"); private static final String BUCKET_NAME = System.getenv("OSS_BUCKET_NAME"); private OSS ossClient; /** * Default Constructor. * Initializes the OSS client immediately upon instantiation. * Throws a RuntimeException if configuration is missing, failing fast. */ public OSSService() { validateConfig(); // Use DefaultCredentialProvider for automatic credential management CredentialsProvider credentialsProvider = new DefaultCredentialProvider(ACCESS_KEY_ID, ACCESS_KEY_SECRET); // Create the OSS client instance this.ossClient = new OSSClientBuilder().build(ENDPOINT, credentialsProvider); } /** * Uploads a byte array to OSS. * * @param objectName The object key (path/filename) to be stored in OSS. * @param data The file content as a byte array. * @return The public access URL of the uploaded file. * @throws RuntimeException if upload fails or configuration is invalid. */ public String uploadFile(String objectName, byte[] data) { if (objectName == null || objectName.trim().isEmpty()) { throw new IllegalArgumentException("Object name cannot be null or empty."); } if (data == null || data.length == 0) { throw new IllegalArgumentException("Data cannot be null or empty."); } try (ByteArrayInputStream inputStream = new ByteArrayInputStream(data)) { // Create the upload request PutObjectRequest putObjectRequest = new PutObjectRequest(BUCKET_NAME, objectName, inputStream); // Upload the file PutObjectResult putObjectResult = ossClient.putObject(putObjectRequest); // Generate the signed URL for access // Set expiration time (e.g., 1 hour) for security best practices Date expiration = new Date(System.currentTimeMillis() + 3600 * 1000); URL url = ossClient.generatePresignedUrl(BUCKET_NAME, objectName, expiration); return url.toString(); } catch (OSSException e) { // Handle specific OSS errors (e.g., permission denied, bucket not found) throw new RuntimeException("OSS operation failed: " + e.getErrorCode() + " - " + e.getMessage(), e); } catch (Exception e) { // Handle general I/O or unexpected errors throw new RuntimeException("Failed to upload file to OSS: " + e.getMessage(), e); } } /** * Closes the OSS client to release resources. * Should be called when the service is no longer needed. */ public void shutdown() { if (ossClient != null) { ossClient.shutdown(); } } /** * Validates that all required environment variables are present. * Throws RuntimeException if any required config is missing. */ private void validateConfig() { if (isBlank(ENDPOINT) || isBlank(ACCESS_KEY_ID) || isBlank(ACCESS_KEY_SECRET) || isBlank(BUCKET_NAME)) { throw new IllegalStateException( "OSS Configuration is incomplete. Please ensure the following environment variables are set: " + "OSS_ENDPOINT, OSS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, OSS_ACCESS_KEY_SECRET, OSS_BUCKET_NAME" ); } } /** * Helper method to check for null or empty strings. */ private boolean isBlank(String str) { return str == null || str.trim().isEmpty(); } }
